projects.title: RideSafe
projects.subtitle: Motorcycle safety application
projects.description: Creator and technical lead for RideSafe, a motorcycle safety app that uses public crash data, external APIs, and risk-based routing to score intersections, road segments, and route options across Texas. Positioned as a competitive entry for the SCLC 2026 Competition.

projects.title: Verifly
projects.subtitle: Real-time identity verification
projects.description: Verifly is a concept for live identity assurance during calls or video: two people join a secure session, one sends a verification challenge (for example a short phrase), and the other confirms it in real time—proving they control the device you are talking to, with optional Face ID or Touch ID. It targets spoofed caller ID and deepfakes by focusing on synchronous trust, not document uploads. Planned direction: Swift/SwiftUI (MVVM) on iOS, challenge-response and session trust scoring, with a lightweight API and Supabase (PostgreSQL) for users, sessions, and verification events.
